DEPT 03. JUDGE TOMAR MASON. CSR: MARILYN NORMAN. CLERK: G. SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES ARE PRESENT. ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED. CASE STANDS SUBMITTED. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $465.81 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $465.81, COSTS ARE AWARDED TO DEFENDANT PER COST BILL.
